calendar.matters:
COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Aug-17-2004 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on for Court Trial/Prove-Up assigned by the PJ's Dept. and continued from July 13, 2004.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S.Ravinantapricha, CSR: Dave Davenport.
Peter H. Liederman, Esq. for Plaintiff Household Bank, N.A.
No appearance by defendant: David M. Sutton.
After hearing the evidence presented, plaintiff's declarations, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff and against the defendant: David M. Sutton as follows:
Principal $618.71
Prejugment Interest $75.16
Attorney's Fees $180.00
Costs $160.30
Judgment signed in open court.

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jul-13-2004 Continued To Aug-17-04 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on for Court Trial/Prove-Up assigned by the PJ's Dept.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S.Ravinantapricha, CSR: Patricia Van Steenberge.
Appearances: Peter H. Liederman, Esq. for Plaintiff Household Bank, N.A.
No appearance by defendant David M. Sutton.
This matter is ordered continued to August 17, 2004 in Dept. 218.
Counsel to send notice of time and place of trial to defendant's correct address of record: 1084 Shotwell, San Francisco.

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar May-18-2004 Continued To Jul-13-04 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on for Court Trial
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S, Ravinantapricha/M. Vallejo, CSR: Yvonne Lee.
Appearances: Peter H. Liederman, Esq. for Plaintiff Household Bank, N.A.
No appearance by defendant David M. Sutton.
This matter is ordered continued to Tuesday, July 13, 2004 in Dept. 218.
Plaintiff to send notice of time and place of trial to defendant's correct address.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Mar-29-2004 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Apr-15-2004 Continued To May-18-04 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218
MINI MINUTES: Case assigned to Dept. 218 from Dept. 206 for default prove-up. Jeff Daniel, Esq. represented Plaintiff Household Bank. Defendant not present. This matter was set for court trial on March 29, 2004. Counsel presents declaration of plaintiff in lieu of personal testimony. The court reviews the file and finds that the proof of service is deficient being served at the wrong address. The matter is continued to May 5, 2004 in Dept. 212 at 1:30 PM for an OSC.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-20-2003 Set For Trial On Mar-29-04 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
